title: phyllagathis nanakorniana
intro: Phyllagathis nanakorniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the loganhil or yellow loganhil. It is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Thai medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Phyllagathis nanakorniana can be made into teas, infusions, or tonics to alleviate symptoms and promote overall health and well-being.
